channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Coinbase and Cardless unveil credit card backed by stablecoins
item.description: The stablecoin-secured card is for situations where a credit card cannot be approved on an unsecured basis.

item.title: Over 200 crypto firms push Senate to pass CLARITY Act
item.description: Crypto lobby groups representing hundreds of organizations urged Senate leaders in a letter to schedule a vote on a key crypto bill ahead of the midterms.

item.title: AI agents with crypto could escape and become ‘unstoppable,’ experts warn
item.description: Autonomous AI and crypto could have “far-reaching consequences for users and the financial system,” IC3 researchers said.

item.title: Bitcoin rebound highlights discount but $162M bid liquidity points to downside risk
item.description: Bitcoin's recovery highlights investors' belief that BTC is discounted, but weak futures market activity could slow the rebound.

item.title: Saylor blamed AI for bitcoin crash. Arca has one word for that: Nonsense
item.description: Arca is blaming Strategy's sale of 32 BTC for last week's BTC crash, not AI capital rotation, as Strategy's Saylor claimed.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin above $63,000 as some traders peg SpaceX's IPO as 'next catalyst'
item.description: Stocks recovered through SpaceX's oversubscribed IPO, an Nvidia and SK Hynix chip pact, and Apple's AI reboot, while crypto trailed.

item.title: Chinese mining CEO says Strategy can survive a $30,000 bitcoin without selling
item.description: Jiang Zhuoer of BTC.TOP called the week's selloff speculation overblown, arguing Strategy's small debt and the design of its preferred shares let it keep buying.

item.title: Humanity Protocol token crashes more than 80% after a $32 million private-key hack
item.description: The decentralized identity project said attackers compromised the keys of a foundation member and are dumping the stolen H tokens for ether.

item.title: UK financial regulator floats allowing 10% crypto allocations for retail funds
item.description: The Financial Conduct Authority floated the idea of allowing limited exposure to crypto for retail-focused funds if it aligns with “disclosed investment objectives.”

item.title: Humanity Protocol token falls 85% amid $30M private key exploit
item.description: The compromise of private keys belonging to a member of the Humanity Foundation has reportedly resulted in the theft of at least $30 million worth of its native token.

item.title: OpenAI confidentially files to go public in the US
item.description: OpenAI says it filed for an initial public offering in the US, but has not yet decided when it will launch.

item.title: Forehead tattoos and alcohol dares: Inside the dark underbelly of crypto's memecoin craze
item.description: Users are being paid to shave their heads, chug liquor and interview homeless people on camera, raising questions about whether Pump.fun's latest product rewards creativity or exploitation.

item.title: OpenAI Wants to Kill the Chatbot It Invented and Turn It Into a Superapp
item.description: The company that launched ChatGPT in 2022 is now betting its future on something closer to WeChat than a Q&A box

item.title: OpenAI Confirms Confidential IPO Filing, Keeps Timing Open
item.description: The ChatGPT maker says it has filed paperwork for a potential public offering but may remain private while it pursues other priorities.

item.title: China's Xiaomi MiMo Is Now 15X Faster Than ChatGPT and Claude
item.description: Xiaomi's MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed blows past the speed threshold custom silicon companies spent years building toward—on regular GPUs.

item.title: Bored Ape Maker Yuga Labs Rescues Dozens of Ethereum NFTs From Exploit
item.description: The Bored Ape Yacht Club creator now holds more than 60 rescued NFTs in its custody as it works to return them to their rightful owners.

item.title: Active tokenized RWAs surge almost 600% despite crypto pullback: Binance
item.description: Tokenized stocks, gold and real estate are driving broader adoption as banks and institutions embrace blockchain-based assets despite a weaker crypto market.

item.title: Apple Unveils Upgraded Siri as Tech Giant's Big AI Push Finally Arrives
item.description: The revamped Siri adds conversational AI, visual understanding, and personal context awareness as Apple rolls out new features across apps.

item.title: Bitcoin Is 'Boring' AI-Hungry Retail Investors, But Bernstein Still Sees $150K This Year
item.description: Bitcoin is down about 50% from its peak, but Wall Street researchers argue the selloff reflects a maturing asset, not a dying one.

item.title: Influential research firm that caused AI stock meltdown lays out Hyperliquid as 'compelling' idea
item.description: Unlike most crypto, Hyperliquid actually generates cash flow and has a token buyback mechanism, says Citrini Research

item.title: 'Best thesis' for Bitcoin accumulation surfaces despite current downside risk: Analyst
item.description: Record-low Bitcoin RSI readings and whale accumulation highlight a generational buying opportunity, even as analysts still expect BTC to fall below $60,000.

item.title: FTX Founder Sam Bankman-Fried Has Formally Filed for a Pardon From President Trump
item.description: President Trump previously ruled out a pardon for Sam Bankman-Fried—but the FTX founder has applied for one anyway.

item.title: We Asked 7 AI Agents to Predict the 2026 World Cup: Here's What They Said
item.description: Can AI help predict the winner of the 2026 World Cup? We put seven of the best models to the test.

item.title: For Bitcoin Giant Strategy, Cash Is Key to Calming Investors: JPMorgan
item.description: Strategy’s fortunes have long been tied to Bitcoin, but it now appears to rest on the greenback, according to JPMorgan analysts.

item.title: What is Zcash (ZEC)? The Privacy Coin Using Zero-Knowledge Proofs
item.description: Zcash is a privacy-focused cryptocurrency that enables users to hide key details of transactions by leveraging zk-SNARKs.

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin tops $63,000 as Strategy adds $100 million BTC in latest purchase
item.description: Meanwhile, Strive bought 32 bitcoin, the same number Strategy dumped last week.

item.title: 'Extremely Bullish': Zcash Rebounds By $2.5 Billion Amid Planned Fix for Supply Conundrum
item.description: Zcash pared steep losses after the privacy coin's backers introduced an upgrade aimed at restoring faith in the digital asset's supply.

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried officially asks Trump for a presidential pardon
item.description: The fallen crypto mogul serving a 25-year sentence filed a clemency petition, betting on Donald Trump's history of crypto pardons even though the president had told him not to count on one.

item.title: The startup killer: Ledger CTO says the EU's crushing compliance costs are choking Web3 innovation
item.description: Industry insiders warn that MiCA's steep financial barriers are choking early-stage innovation.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Buys the Dip Amid 'Superficial' Crypto Selloff, Adding $214M in Ethereum
item.description: Leading Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies bought the dip, making its largest weekly ETH purchase so far this year.

item.title: Aave chief defends protocol's 'resilience' after $8.45 billion bank run
item.description: The founder of the largest DeFi platform blamed "third-party” entities for decentralized finance’s vulnerabilities, while independent data highlights severe gaps in Aave’s own risk architecture.

item.title: Bitcoin price $60K support not yet safe as more macro headwinds stack up
item.description: Bitcoin analysis warned that $60,000 may not hold next, as bear-market moves continued and macro hurdles multiplied.

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1.7B as outflow streak hits four weeks
item.description: BlackRock’s IBIT accounted for most of the weekly Bitcoin ETF redemptions, while Fidelity and Grayscale funds also saw outflows.

item.title: Blame bitcoin's tumble on rising inflation, not Strategy, 10xResearch argues
item.description: The main driver behind bitcoin's weakness was ETF selling after red-hot April U.S. inflation data, 10x's Markus Thielen argued. The bounce may hinge on Wednesday's CPI data, he said.

item.title: Bitcoin price eyes $90K as FTX-era BTC bullish divergence flashes again
item.description: Bitcoin flashes only its second weekly bullish divergence on record, a signal that previously preceded a 755% BTC price rally.

item.title: The intersection of crypto and AI is one of the most hyped spaces in tech—but where does the actual science stand? Crypto x AI, AI x Crypto: A Survey, a new paper by IC3, cuts through the noise to provide a comprehensive, clear-eyed analysis of this evolving - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBlZE05WjRQQ2FXd3RjMkZCaDFEZXdZM29RS3RqVS1rYVJ6a1NneWx3WUpNSjZZeF94RUt0eUJ2Z2JILUhyQnd4ang2VkZXdFdaQTE0SHplcUJQQUR0OE93?oc=5" target="_blank">The intersection of crypto and AI is o…

item.title: South Korea police raid Bithumb over lawmaker hiring favoritism probe: report
item.description: South Korean lawmaker Kim Byung-gi faces probe over alleged nepotism tied to his son’s crypto jobs as police raid Bithumb's offices.

item.title: Congress to Discuss Crypto Tax Rules: What to Watch
item.description: The House Ways and Means committee will review draft crypto tax bills covering staking, mining, network fees, and reporting.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Strategy buys 1,550 Bitcoin after controversial 32 BTC sale
item.description: Strategy resumed Bitcoin buying by purchasing 1,550 BTC for $101.3 million, bringing its total holdings to 845,256 BTC after last week’s controversial sale.

item.title: Strategy Buys Bitcoin, Pads Cash Reserves Following Biggest Weekly Stock Drop Since 2022
item.description: Strategy’s stockpile was $10.7 billion underwater as of Monday morning after Bitcoin hit its lowest price since October 2024.s

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR gains 12.3% as almost all assets trade higher
item.description: Bittensor (TAO), up 12% from Friday, joined NEAR Protocol (NEAR) as a top performer.

item.title: 🇺🇸 LATEST: Stand With Crypto and more than 200 companies and organizations have signed a letter urging Senate leaders to bring the Clarity Act to the Senate floor. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBObWNZcWpMaHhNNmtONjNSdktZbjR1MmdIdnRacUh5cTBjdnRicW5Eb1E2Zl9RUWJ6YXVETHlDMVctdXZveVVMMnZrT2JsVlY2d2p4dzFid3ZWYm9CclNlVEtTYlo?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 LATEST: Stand With Crypto …

item.title: MetaMask Launches AI Agent Wallet With Built-In Security Controls
item.description: MetaMask's new self-custodial wallet is designed to let AI agents trade across DeFi while keeping users in control of funds and approvals.

item.title: MetaMask launches AI agent wallet with built-in security for crypto trades
item.description: The launch comes as AI agents increasingly emerge as participants in crypto markets, executing trades and managing capital on behalf of users.

item.title: Bitmine bought the dip, making its biggest ether purchase in 2026 as prices tanked
item.description: The company bought 126,971 ETH last week, worth roughly $214 million at current prices, despite chairman Tom Lee's earlier calls to slow purchases.

item.title: Bitcoin's $63K Reclaim Liquidates $540M in Crypto Shorts, a 7-Week High
item.description: Experts remain cautious of Bitcoin’s weekend rebound to $63,000, pointing to ETF outflows and CME BTC volatility.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Recovers After Fall Below $60k
item.description: Crypto rebounded Monday after Friday's selloff, driven by strong jobs data, AI IPO liquidity drain and Saylor worries.

item.title: Strategy buys 1,550 bitcoin one week after selling $2.5 million of coins
item.description: Strategy adds bitcoin and cash after raising $181 million through stock sales.

item.title: White hats rescue $500K in NFTs after Flooring exploit
item.description: CoinGecko and NFT Price Floor data show NFT market cap has cooled since April, while CryptoPunks and BAYC remain top collections by value.

item.title: Strategy Resumes Bitcoin Buying After Last Week’s Sale, Adds 1,550 BTC Strategy announced the purchase of 1,550 BTC for approximately $101 million, increasing its holdings to 845,256 BTC. The move follows last week’s sale of 32 BTC, which the compan - x.com

item.title: A crucial bitcoin market indicator is signaling that the worst of the crypto crash might be over
item.description: The metric shows bitcoin's market price is getting close to its realized fair value after the recent sell-off.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Vivek Ramaswamy's 'Strive' buys 32 Bitcoin worth $2 million. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9RYlptajdzV1I0VkNUNDZYM0k3X2Yxc3ZpV2RqMThGN3FYaXJJSC10c3o0ZF9PZ0Nfc3JMcHBhaUQ0VmZ3WEpBYXlod1FHWFVIRTNicERTcDNHNGZ5ZEhWZVN3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Vivek Ramaswamy's 'S…

item.title: POV: Bitcoin in 2010 - x.com
item.description: POV: Bitcoin in 2010

item.title: BTC price bottom not due until Q4? Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin traders warned that it should be Q3 at least before the real BTC price bear market bottom entered.

item.title: Reform UK's Farage 'Evading' Scrutiny Over Tether Billionaire's $6.7M Gift: Labour
item.description: Labour Party Chair Anna Turley wrote to Nigel Farage accusing him of “evading reasonable scrutiny” over Christopher Harborne’s gift.

item.title: Bybit challenges Wall Street with a massive push into tokenized U.S. stock IPOs
item.description: Retail investors can now buy shares at official underwritten prices through the crypto exchange, bypassing Wall Street’s exclusive pre-IPO clubs.

item.title: Crypto's recovery remains elusive as SpaceX, Anthropic IPOs loom
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 8, 2026

item.title: Chinese court treats Bitcoin as property in 107 BTC memory theft case
item.description: Man in eastern China who stole 107 Bitcoin using a memorized seed phrase gets 10 years and nine months behind bars.
